title: Ukrainian Railways Trains Pack (for MTR)
description: OBJ-Models of the Ukrainian Railways' (Ukrzaliznytsia) rolling stock, made and optimized for Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod.
body:
This recourcepack contains trains that are currently operated by **Ukrainian Railways** (or shortly UZ). There are not a lot of trains yet but more will be added as the time goes on.

**Currently available rolling stock:**
- EKr1 "Tarpan"
- EPL2T
- EPL9T
- ER9M

All Minecraft versions are supported. 
The recourcepack is **not** yet updated for **MTR 4.x.x** versions! 
**NTE is required!** 
For bug-reports or improvements contact me on Discord via MTR official community server or DMs.
